history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 07, column F, facing downwards. The goal is at row 05, column E. I need to move right, then down, then left, then down to reach the goal. The cell in front of me is a wall, so I need to turn right first. Turning right will allow me to move to the cell at row 07, column E.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

</thought>
<action>
